svg.text: McCzarny recently focused heavily on his
`crater-js` game, introducing several new mob
types such as Stone Beetles and Worms, complete
with expanded animations and AI. He implemented
a comprehensive region modifier system,
allowing dynamic customization of world
generation, mob density, and special features.
Gameplay mechanics were significantly enhanced
with falling boulder hazards, basic combat,
character death, and refined character movement
and action handling. He also made structural
improvements in `crater-js` by renaming "World"
to "Region" for consistency and migrating to a
tilemap system. In his `chromium-daily-digest`
project, he added a feature to include tags in
the generated summaries. Additionally, McCzarny
reported a recurring bug to `microsoft/vscode`
where the "Agent mode fails to process a
prompt", providing detailed console errors for
the issue.
